creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port lang/racket fails at the staging section using poudriere on 14.1-STABLE amd64.

uname -a

FreeBSD alto.my.domain 14.1-STABLE FreeBSD 14.1-STABLE stable/14-45764d1d4 GENERIC amd64

The build log shows the following:

raco setup: installing: <collects>/racket
raco setup: installing: <pkgs>/gui-lib/mred
expand-elf: cannot move SHT_PROGBITS section
